calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to VITALY (PP) GIGINYAK for failure to file Bankruptcy Status Report is scheduled this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Yvonne Lee # 5616 (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Court ordered Plaintiff in Propria Persona sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 11/18/2004 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Patricia J. VanSteenberge. (212)
